challenge.title: Korak 52
challenge.description: Nakon vašeg poslednjeg .divider, kreirajte još jedan p element sa tekstom Trans Fat 0g. Italizujte reč Trans obavijanjem je u i element. Dajte novom p elementu atribut class postavljen na indent no-divider. Obavijte Trans Fat 0g u span element za poravnanje.

challengeFiles.name: index

challengeFiles.name: styles

tests.text: You should create a new p element at the end of your .daily-value element.
Your new p element should have the text Trans Fat 0g.
Your new p element should have the class attribute set to indent no-divider.
Your new p element should have an i element.
Your new p element should have a span element.
Your span element should wrap the text Trans Fat 0g.

* The % Daily Value (DV) tells you how much a nutrient in a serving of food contributes to a daily diet. 2,000 calories a day is used for general nutrition advice.
